relationships.relationship_description: Partnered to build a more dementia-friendly community.

source_metadata.evidence_original: We are proud to be working in partnership with Hong Kong Alzheimer’s Disease Association. Together we are building a more dementia-friendly community...
source_metadata.evidence_translated: We are proud to be working in partnership with the Hong Kong Alzheimer's Disease Association. Together we are building a more dementia-friendly community...

relationships.relationship_description: DBS Group Holdings connected with Singapore Centre for Social Enterprise for discussions to create impact.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Regular events and conversations with Businesses for Impact, community partners and social service agencies to understand the social landscape and how DBS can partner to create impact. Connection with government bodies and associations, including Singapore Centre for Social Enterprise and Community Chest.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Regular events and conversations with Businesses for Impact, community partners and social service agencies to understand the social landscape and how DBS can partner to create impact. Connection with government bodies and associations, including Singapore Centre for Social Enterprise and Community Chest.

relationships.relationship_description: DBS Group Holdings and Reliance Industries collaborate on a Compressed Biogas (CBG) project in India.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Case study 2: Reliance Industries Limited and DBS Bank India collaborate to promote Compressed Biogas (CBG) project...DBS collaborated with Reliance to develop a supply chain financing programme...
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Case study 2: Reliance Industries Limited and DBS Bank India collaborate to promote Compressed Biogas (CBG) project...DBS collaborated with Reliance to develop a supply chain financing programme...

relationships.relationship_description: DBS Group Holdings collaborates with Migrant Workers' Centre to help migrant workers overcome language barriers in digital skills.

source_metadata.evidence_original: In collaboration with the Migrant Workers' Centre, we launched the inaugural 'MiDigi Ambassador Programme,’ an initiative to help migrant workers overcome language barriers in picking up digital skills.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: In collaboration with the Migrant Workers' Centre, we launched the inaugural 'MiDigi Ambassador Programme,’ an initiative to help migrant workers overcome language barriers in picking up digital skills.

relationships.relationship_description: DBS Group Holdings actively supported the Monetary Authority of Singapore in its industry-focused initiatives.

source_metadata.evidence_original: In early 2023, the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) initiated an industry-focused Gen Al Project to drive innovation and responsible use of Gen Al... MAS established a consortium of financial industry companies, leading technology providers and consultancies to drive this initiative.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: In early 2023, the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) initiated an industry-focused General Artificial Intelligence (Gen AI) Project to drive innovation and responsible use of Gen AI... MAS established a consortium of financial industry companies, leading technology providers and consultancies to drive this initiative.

relationships.relationship_description: DBS Group Holdings supported the Infocomm Media Development Authority in promoting the DPTM programme.

source_metadata.evidence_original: In 2023, we actively supported the IMDA’s efforts in its promotion of its DPTM programme...
source_metadata.evidence_translated: In 2023, we actively supported the Infocomm Media Development Authority’s (IMDA) efforts in its promotion of its Data Protection Trustmark (DPTM) programme...

relationships.relationship_description: DBS Group Holdings committed significant funds to support the efforts and expansion of the DBS Foundation.

source_metadata.evidence_original: The Bank committed an additional SGD 100 million to further its efforts in creating positive societal impact. This went towards growing the work of DBSF, which includes expanding its scope with the formation of the Community Impact chapter...
source_metadata.evidence_translated: The Bank committed an additional SGD 100 million to further its efforts in creating positive societal impact. This went towards growing the work of DBS Foundation, which includes expanding its scope with the formation of the Community Impact chapter...

relationships.target: The Community Chest of Hong Kong
relationships.relationship_description: Hang Seng University supports The Community Chest of Hong Kong through sponsorship and participation in its programs.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Hang Seng has continued to provide support to The Community Chest of Hong Kong (‘the Chest’). We are the Diamond Sponsor of Dress Casual Day for the 25th consecutive year.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Hang Seng has continued to provide support to The Community Chest of Hong Kong (‘the Chest’). We are the Diamond Sponsor of Dress Casual Day for the 25th consecutive year.

relationships.relationship_description: Hang Seng University collaborates with the Hong Kong Table Tennis Association to nurture local table tennis talents.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Co-organised with the Hong Kong Table Tennis Association, the Hang Seng Table Tennis Academy (‘HSTTA’) identifies and nurtures home-grown table tennis talents through high- quality, structured training sessions.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Co-organised with the Hong Kong Table Tennis Association, the Hang Seng Table Tennis Academy (‘HSTTA’) identifies and nurtures home-grown table tennis talents through high- quality, structured training sessions.

relationships.relationship_description: Hang Seng University funds the Hang Seng Low Carbon Future – SolarCare Programme in collaboration with CarbonCare InnoLab.

source_metadata.evidence_original: In collaboration with CarbonCare InnoLab (‘CCIL’), we funded the Hang Seng Low Carbon Future – SolarCare Programme, a project which involved the installation of over 268 solar panels at the Breakthrough Youth Village in 2022.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: In collaboration with CarbonCare InnoLab (‘CCIL’), we funded the Hang Seng Low Carbon Future – SolarCare Programme, a project which involved the installation of over 268 solar panels at the Breakthrough Youth Village in 2022.

relationships.relationship_description: Hang Seng University supports The Conservancy Association through the Country Parks Plantation Enrichment Programme.

source_metadata.evidence_original: We supported The Conservancy Association (‘CA’) in the Country Parks Plantation Enrichment Programme (‘PEP’), which was launched by the Agriculture, Fisheries and Conservation Department.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: We supported The Conservancy Association (‘CA’) in the Country Parks Plantation Enrichment Programme (‘PEP’), which was launched by the Agriculture, Fisheries and Conservation Department.

relationships.relationship_description: Hang Seng University supports WWF Hong Kong through corporate membership programmes.

source_metadata.evidence_original: We also continued to provide support to the corporate membership programmes of the World Wide Fund for Nature Hong Kong and Business Environment Council.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: We also continued to provide support to the corporate membership programmes of the World Wide Fund for Nature Hong Kong and Business Environment Council.

relationships.relationship_description: Hang Seng University supports Business Environment Council through corporate membership programmes.

source_metadata.evidence_original: We also continued to provide support to the corporate membership programmes of the World Wide Fund for Nature Hong Kong and Business Environment Council.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: We also continued to provide support to the corporate membership programmes of the World Wide Fund for Nature Hong Kong and Business Environment Council.

pain_points.painpoint: The stigma and lack of understanding about people living with dementia.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Dementia Friends is a global movement that aims to change people’s perceptions of dementia, to tackle the stigma and lack of understanding about people living with the condition.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Dementia Friends is a global movement that aims to change people’s perceptions of dementia, to tackle the stigma and lack of understanding about people living with the condition.

pain_points.painpoint: Concerns raised by employees about wellbeing, including work-related stress and rewards and recognition.

source_metadata.evidence_original: Through the annual employee engagement survey and quarterly employee experience survey, the key areas of concern raised by employees are around wellbeing (work-related stress), and rewards and recognition.
source_metadata.evidence_translated: Through the annual employee engagement survey and quarterly employee experience survey, the key areas of concern raised by employees are around wellbeing (work-related stress), and rewards and recognition.
